---
id: get-gateway-connect-result
title: "查询网关入网结果"
description: "查询网关入网操作的结果。传 deviceIds 时查询指定网关的入网结果；"
sidebar_label: "查询网关入网结果"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-api/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询网关入网结果"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/gateways/connect/result"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



查询网关入网操作的结果。传 deviceIds 时查询指定网关的入网结果；
不传 deviceIds 时根据 bindTime 查询该时间之后所有发起过入网的网关及其结果。
入网失败时响应仅包含 deviceId、code、message；
入网成功时额外返回 deviceName、supportZigbee、supportedMatterRoles、space、bindTime。


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"deviceIds","in":"query","description":"网关设备ID集合。URL 示例：deviceIds=xx1,xx2 或 deviceIds=xx1&deviceIds=xx2。缺省时根据 bindTime 查询该时间之后入网的网关","required":false,"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"bindTime","in":"query","description":"开始入网时间（毫秒级 UTC 时间戳），即发起入网操作的时间点，作为查询起点","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"},"example":1710001234567}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","deviceName","bindTime"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"网关设备 ID"},"deviceName":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"网关名称（成功时返回）"},"supportZigbee":{"type":"boolean","nullable":true,"description":"是否支持 Zigbee"},"supportedMatterRoles":{"type":"integer","nullable":true,"description":"支持的 ID"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"空间名称"}},"title":"DeviceSpace","nullable":true,"description":"网关所在空间（成功时返回）"},"bindTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"入网时间戳（毫秒级 UTC
